items.title: SK Hynix, AST SpaceMobile, SpaceX: 5 Stocks Investors Couldn't Stop Buzzing About This Week
items.excerpt: Retail investors talked up five hot stocks during the week (July 13 to July 17) on X and Reddit: NFLX, ASTS, SKHY, MU, SPCX.

items.title: AST SpaceMobile: Convertible Notes Accelerate Its Full Potential (NASDAQ:ASTS)
items.excerpt: AST SpaceMobile delayed its 45-satellite target to early 2027 due to launch constraints. Find out why ASTS stock is upgraded to Strong Buy.

items.title: Why Piper Sandler Likes AST SpaceMobile (ASTS) Stock Over Other Space Stocks

items.title: AST SpaceMobile: Why I Bought The Dip

items.title: Why Is AST SpaceMobile Stock Soaring Tuesday?
items.excerpt: AST SpaceMobile shares surge 11% following a $1.15 billion debt deal, expanding total cash reserves to over $3.8 billion.

items.title: AST SpaceMobile Makes History in 5G Broadband Cellular Connectivity from Space
items.excerpt: First-ever 5G connection for voice and data between an everyday, unmodified smartphone and a satellite in space.

items.title: T-Mobile Takes Coverage Above and Beyond With SpaceX
